nasb.text: So he was hidden with her in the house of the Lord six years, while Athaliah was reigning over the land.

esv.text: And he remained with her six years, hidden in the house of the Lord, while Athaliah reigned over the land.

cnv.text: 約阿施和他的乳母在耶和華的殿中躲藏了六年；亞他利雅卻作王統治那地。

ccb.text: 约阿施和他的乳母在耶和华的殿里藏了六年，那时亚她利雅篡位当政。
